name: Memory (Cognee)
description: Cognee-backed memory dataset manager for file-backed memory and library indexes. This plugin does not manage prompt context.

deleteMode.description: Cognee delete mode for removed file-backed memory (default: soft)

maxResults.description: Maximum search results returned by CLI/tools (default: 6)

minScore.description: Minimum retrieval score after local ranking adjustment (default: 0)

maxTokens.description: Token cap passed to Cognee search (default: 512)

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for Cognee requests (default: 60000)

ingestionTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for add/update requests (default: 300000)

searchPrompt.description: Optional system prompt sent to Cognee search

datasets.description: Fixed dataset profiles. This plugin manages memory datasets only; it does not inject prompt context.

datasetName.description: Cognee dataset name for the primary memory dataset

autoIndex.description: Auto-sync the memory dataset on startup and after agent runs (default: true)

autoCognify.description: Run cognify after new memory entries are added (default: true)

autoRecall.description: Compatibility metadata only. This plugin does not inject runtime context.

datasetName.description: Cognee dataset name for the explicit reference library dataset

paths.description: Explicit markdown roots for the library dataset

autoCognify.description: Run cognify after new library entries are added (default: false)

autoRecall.description: Compatibility metadata only. This plugin does not inject runtime context.
